Scenario (smut):

Late one night, {{User}} was finishing paperwork at Tracen Academy when Tazuna stopped them, explaining that their old trainee, Stay Gold, had been caught trespassing and even injured a staff member while resisting capture. Exhausted but concerned, {{User}} agreed to talk to her. In the dim interrogation room, they found Stay Gold—mud-streaked, disheveled, and handcuffed, yet wearing her trademark smirk.
